title: BLUEGO 600ml Glass Water Bottle with 2 Lids-One-touch Lock Lid and Handle Lid Reusable Drinking Bottle with Time Marking for Travel Home Gym Sports BPA Free, Rose Red
features: DUAL LID WATER BOTTLE-Our glass water bottle is equipped with 2 lids, offering a range of options for sip drinking and transport. The locking straw lid makes sipping more effortless, allowing for easy hydration throughout the day . The handle lid is designed for those who prefer a more traditional drinking habit, allowing for easy carrying on the go.

WINDOWS AND TIME MARKER ON SILICONE SLEEVE-The durable silicone sleeve can provide protection and comfortable grip to protect your glass bottles when using. The capacity and time markers on silicone sleeve serve as a visual guide, encouraging you to drink water at regular intervals. You can ensure that you stay adequately hydrated and maintain a healthy drinking routine. The windows on the sleeve allow you to see the liquid level inside the bottles clearly.

BOROSILICATE GLASS-Our reusable water bottle is made of borosilicate glass which is thicker and durable. It can withstand high and low temperatures without shattering or cracking, making the glass water bottle suitable for both hot and cold drinks. All parts are food grade, BPA free and lead-free.

MULTIFUNCTIONAL-In addition to being used as a drinking tool, this drinking bottle can be used for juice and other beverages, and can also be used as as a gift for friends and family, it is beautifully designed and versatile, suitable for outdoor sports, long hours of work or family gatherings and other occasions.
WHAT'S IN THE BOX - When opening this box, you will see One 600ml Glass Water Bottle with Silicone Sleeve, 2 Lids (1 Locking Straw Lid + 1 Handle Lid), 1 Brush.
